hero.heading:
Design that Inspires.
Products that Perform.
hero.subtitle: Independent product design studio helping founders and teams ship App, Website, and SaaS Dashboard experiences that look sharp and work harder.

about.heading: I'm a Product Designer with 5+ years of experience turning ideas into intuitive digital products.
paragraphs: I run an independent design studio specializing in App Design, Website Design, and SaaS Dashboard Design — partnering with founders and product teams to design experiences that are both beautiful and easy to use.
From early-stage wireframes to polished, developer-ready UI, I handle the full product design process: research, UX flows, visual design, and design systems that scale.

services.title: App Design
services.desc: Native and cross-platform mobile app UI/UX — from onboarding flows to polished, ready-to-build interfaces.

services.title: Website Design
services.desc: Marketing sites, landing pages, and web apps designed to convert visitors and represent your brand well.

services.title: SaaS Dashboard Design
services.desc: Data-dense dashboards and admin panels made simple — clear hierarchy, usable charts, and scalable UI systems.

process.title: Discover

faq.question: How does the design process work?
faq.answer: We start with a discovery call, move into wireframes and UI design, then hand off developer-ready files with a full design system.

faq.question: What's your typical project timeline?
faq.answer: Most App, Website, or SaaS Dashboard projects run 2–6 weeks depending on scope, with weekly check-ins throughout.

faq.question: How many revisions are included?
faq.answer: Every project includes rounds of feedback and revisions at each stage, so nothing moves forward until you're happy with it.

faq.question: Do you also work with development teams?
faq.answer: Yes — deliverables include developer-ready specs, assets, and design systems built to hand off cleanly to any engineering team.

faq.question: How do we get started?
faq.answer: Book a free intro call from the button above, or send an email — we'll scope the project together from there.

contact.heading: Have a project in mind? Let's design it.
contact.subtitle: Currently taking on new App, Website, and SaaS Dashboard design projects. Book a free intro call or drop an email.
